summary: The diff implements the majority of the required features for WebSearch360. Most core requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-11) appear to be addressed with corresponding components. However, several specific acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified due to file truncation, and one notable concern is the article count for REQ-7 (the mockArticles.ts file is truncated so the 88-article minimum cannot be confirmed). The required images are not present in the diff. Overall implementation quality appears high with all major structural components present.

missing_requirements.requirement: At least 88 realistic mock news articles (8-10 per category) across all 11 categories
missing_requirements.reason: The mockArticles.ts file is truncated and only shows partial politics articles. Cannot verify the 88-article minimum is met across all 11 categories.

missing_requirements.requirement: Two required images must be present: globe-radar-icon.dim_128x128.png and news-thumbnail-placeholder.dim_400x225.png
missing_requirements.reason: The diff lists 24 added files but neither image asset file is present among the added files. The components reference these paths but the actual image files were not added.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the entire app
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Internet Identity / authentication' as a non-goal, yet main.tsx wraps the App in InternetIdentityProvider with full auth client setup in useInternetIdentity.ts and useActor.ts.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend Motoko canister included in the project
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Backend Motoko canister logic - this is a pure frontend app' is a non-goal, yet backend/main.mo is included as an added file.
